name: comapeo-core-cross-version-versions
description: Published @comapeo/core versions used by the cross-version sync tests. Installed separately from the root package (`npm ci --prefix test-e2e/cross-version/versions`) so that regular `npm ci` stays fast and old versions resolve their dependencies in isolation from the working tree. See ../versions.js for the canonical list and the procedure for adding or removing a version.
